EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} disconnected from {dst.host}:{dst.port} on {src.host}:{src.port} due to the rule {datafield1}. Reason: {reason}.
Disconnection from {dst.host}:{dst.port} occurred on {src.host}:{src.port} due to the rule {datafield1}. Reason: {reason}.
The user {subject.account.name} with the username {object.account.name} disconnected from {dst.host}:{dst.port} on {src.host}:{src.port} due to the rule {datafield1}. Reason: {reason}.
Disconnection on host {src.host}:{src.port} occurred due to the rule {datafield1}. Reason: {reason}.
